title: Japanese Hazelnut Croustade
description: A Japanese-inspired dessert combining crunchy hazelnuts with crouton-like texture from arabian croute, all wrapped in a sweet and crunchy exterior.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix together croute, hazelnuts, and a pinch of salt.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together honey and sugar until well combined.
4. Pour the honey mixture over the croute mixture and mix until everything is well coated.
5. Pour the mixture onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely before breaking it up into pieces.
8. Enjoy as a snack or dessert.
